en: Did you know that Conan O'Brien has two children?
The first is his daughter Nev O'Brien, who was born in 2003
and is the first child of Conan and his wife Liza Powell O'Brien.
Nev seems to have inherited her father's intelligence.
She currently attends the prestigious Yale University
and works as an illustrator for the Yale Daily News.
Conan often mentions on his podcast that his daughter is extremely sharp
and can instantly see through the silly stories he makes up at the dinner table.
The second is his son Beckett O'Brien, who was born in 2005.
From a young age, he showed a very unique personality.
One of the most memorable stories Conan has shared on his show
is that during a school hero day, Beckett refused to dress as a superhero
and instead accurately recreated Steve Jobs,
which became a classic comedic anecdote on the program.
Although Conan has hosted countless shows in the television industry,
neither of his children has pursued a career in entertainment.
He has always placed great importance on family life,
and off-camera he's more like a...
